videos.headline: Greg Desrosiers takes off on a 29-yard TD run for Memphis
videos.description: Greg Desrosiers Jr. finds the end zone for the third time as Memphis extends its lead over No. 17 Tulane.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Touchdown! Gregory Derosiers scores vs. Tulane) 2024/11/29 ESHEET

videos.headline: Mario Anderson caps Memphis' upset win with 47-yard TD run
videos.description: Mario Anderson Jr. turns on the jets and finds the end zone as Memphis upsets No. 17 Tulane.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (End Zone! Mario Anderson scores 47-yard rushing touchdown) 2024/11/29 ESHEET

videos.headline: Seth Henigan finds a leaping Greg Desrosiers for Memphis' opening TD
videos.description: QB Seth Henigan throws a dart to Greg Desrosiers Jr. who makes the catch in midair for the Memphis Tigers.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Seth Henigan connects for 17-yard TD pass) 2024/11/29 ESHEET

videos.headline: Mario Williams reels in TD catch to give Tulane its first lead
videos.description: Tulane takes a first-quarter lead over Memphis thanks to Mario Williams' 7-yard TD catch.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Mario Williams reels in TD catch to give Tulane its first lead) 2024/11/29 ESHEET

videos.headline: Greg Desrosiers scores his 2nd TD on a catch-and-run for Memphis
videos.description: Seth Henigan connects for 25-yard TD pass

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Seth Henigan connects for 25-yard TD pass) 2024/11/29 ESHEET

videos.headline: Arnold Barnes punches it in for a Tulane TD

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Arnold Barnes scores 2-yard rushing touchdown) 2024/11/29 ESHEET

videos.headline: Shazz Preston leaps and snags a tough TD catch for Tulane
videos.description: Shazz Preston leaps and snags a tough TD catch for Tulane.
